resources.string: One tap for a distraction-free, full-screen TikTok experience. No ads, no comments, no UI clutter.
Enables the floating trigger button and automatically activates TikTok\'s built-in Clean Display mode with a single tap.
Lets our floating trigger button appear on top of TikTok so you can activate clean mode without leaving the app.
Allows the service to dispatch a long-press gesture and interact with TikTok\'s UI to enable clean display mode.
🎉 You\'re all set! Open TikTok — the floating button will appear on screen.
Please open TikTok first, then tap the button.
Gesture failed. Make sure TikTok is playing a video.
Could not find Clear Display. Try tapping again.
